name: rustik-salon-platform
description: Premium Luxury Salon Management & Portfolio Platform for Rustik Academy

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --prefix backend || echo 'No build script for backend'
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend

author: Antigravity
